executionArgs.additionalInstruction:
The response from POST /api/analyze now includes an `alerts` field (array of Alert objects). Each alert has: level ("HIGH" | "MEDIUM" | "LOW"), code ("CONFLICT_OF_INTEREST" | "NARRATIVE_ISOLATION" | "MEDIA_CONCENTRATION"), and message (string). 

Critical test cases to cover:
1. `alerts` field is present in the response and is an array
2. Alerts are sorted HIGH → MEDIUM → LOW (never reversed)
3. When narrativeDivergence.score is exactly 70, NARRATIVE_ISOLATION alert must NOT appear (rule is strictly > 70)
4. When narrativeDivergence.score is 71, NARRATIVE_ISOLATION alert MUST appear
5. When narrativeDivergence.score is null (embeddings unavailable), NARRATIVE_ISOLATION alert must NOT appear
6. When alerts array is empty, response still returns alerts: []
7. Each alert object has exactly the shape: { level, code, message }
